items.title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
items.content:
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

Language: TypeScript
Stars: 32390
Forks: 3678
items.contentSnippet:
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
Language: TypeScript
Stars: 32390
Forks: 3678
items.creator: abhigyanpatwari
items.summary: GitNexus是一个客户端知识图谱引擎，可在浏览器中运行。用户可上传GitHub仓库或ZIP文件，获得交互式代码知识图谱和内置的Graph RAG Agent，显著提升代码理解和探索效率。采用零服务器架构，所有处理在本地完成，保护代码隐私。
items.ai_reason: 零服务器架构的代码智能理解工具，创新性强；知识图谱+Graph RAG在代码探索中的应用新颖；32390 stars表明极高的社区认可度和实用价值

items.title: CJackHwang/ds2api
items.content:
Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

Language: Go
Stars: 2172
Forks: 628
items.contentSnippet:
Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
Language: Go
Stars: 2172
Forks: 628
items.creator: CJackHwang
items.summary: 这是一个将Deepseek及其他LLM提供商的API协议统一转换为通用格式的轻量级高性能中间件，支持多账号轮换、编译二进制部署（Vercel Serverless、Docker），兼容Google、Claude、OpenAI的API格式，星标2k+，适合需要统一管理多个LLM API的工程场景
items.ai_reason: LLM API网关类工具，实现多提供商协议转换与统一，有技术实现价值但非Agent核心领域，属于LLM工程化基础设施
